body: This PR updates the `copyto!` benchmark. Base (and CUDA, I think) specialize on `Base.Broadcasted(::typeof(identity), ::Number)` to call a highly specialized memcopy, and it's not really fair to compare against our implementation. We can specialize ours (https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/1887), but we didn't intend for this benchmark to focus on this specialized case.
title: Update copyto benchmark

body: This got removed somewhere, but there's no strong reason not to have it to cut down instantiation time.
title: Add back depot

body: This PR adds a index-swapping benchmark script demonstrating/motivating the need for #1902, and similar work to be done in fixing the stencil operations.
title: Add index-swapping benchmark script
